class.name: Arcanist
class.description: Arcanists focus on manipulating the arcane, the purest form of magic. Play an arcanist if you want to cast diverse magic in battle.

startingEquipment.description: You gain mystic robes and an implement.
startingEquipment.suggestion: You gain mystic robes and a wand as your implement.

origins.name: Gifted
origins.description: You made a pact with a powerful entity for your arcane magic, or perhaps it was gifted upon you as a reward.

origins.name: Innate
origins.description: Thanks to a magical bloodline, experimentation, or arcane exposure, magic flows through your veins and is a part of you.

origins.name: Learned
origins.description: Through intense study and preparation, you have learned the secrets of arcane magic.

features.name: Arcanist Magic
features.description: You begin untapping the power of arcane magic.

details.label: Mana
details.value: 2, increasing to 5 at 5th level, and 8 at 8th level

details.label: Magic Tradition
details.value: You learn the arcane tradition and another magic tradition, except for eldritch, holy, nature, or unholy. You also learn a tier 1 battle spell from each tradition.
details.suggestion: You learn the arcane and protection traditions. From the arcane tradition, you learn the arcane dart and arcane barrage battle spells, and from the protection tradition you learn quick ward and greater ward battle spells.

details.label: Spells at Higher Levels
details.value: At levels 2, 4, 6, and 9, you learn a battle spell or a magic tradition, except for eldritch, holy, nature, or unholy.

features.name: High Magic
features.descriptor: You have learned to command greater spells.
features.effect: Treat the spell's tier as one higher

features.name: Subclass
features.description: Choose the wizard subclass, or another subclass of your choice. At 1st level, you gain features from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Class Talents
features.description: Starting at 2nd level, you gain one class talent from the list at the end of this class description. You gain another class talent at 4th, 6th, and 9th levels.

features.name: Theme Talents
features.description: You also gain a theme talent from your theme. You gain another theme talent at 4th, 6th, and 9th level.

features.name: Countermagic
features.descriptor: You utilize your knowledge of the arcane to disrupt another caster's magic.
features.trigger: You see a creature within 1 zone use a magical ability
features.effect: The ability's attack roll takes -1 misfortune

subclasses.name: Wizard
subclasses.description: Wizards take a studious approach in learning all forms of magic.

features.name: Studious Spell
features.descriptor: You analyze your surroundings as you unleash your magic.

subclasses.name: Sorcerer
subclasses.description: Sorcerers imbue their bodies with arcane energy, becoming one with magic. Some are born this way, while others achieve this state through dangerous magical experiments.

features.name: Unleash Arcane
features.descriptor: You enter an unstable state of heightened magic that leaves your physical body exposed
effect: +1 fortune to attack rolls with magical abilities

subclasses.name: Warmage
subclasses.description: You specialize in casting from the frontlines of battle, using magic to bolster your defenses and destruction.

features.name: War Magic
features.description: While wearing mystic robes, you gain +1 to Guard. Also, when you deal damage on an attack roll with a magical ability, you deal additional damage equal to your tier.

tier1.name: Expanded Arcanist Magic
tier1.description: Learn a battle spell or magic tradition from one listed in arcanist magic. You can take this class talent multiple times.

tier1.name: Far Spell
tier1.descriptor: You extend your magic further than possible.
tier1.trigger: You cast a battle spell that targets a creature or zone
tier1.effect: For a range spell, increase the range by 1 zone, or for a melee spell, you can instead target a creature within your zone.

tier1.name: Powerful Spell
tier1.trigger: You cast a tier 1+ battle spell that deals initial damage
tier1.effect: Increase the triggering spell's initial damage by the spell tier.

tier1.name: Safe Spell
tier1.descriptor: You shield your allies from your magic.
tier1.trigger: You cast a battle spell that targets an entire zone or zone border
tier1.effect: Choose a number of creatures equal to your proficiency bonus to be unaffected by the triggering spell.

tier1.name: Substitute Spell
tier1.description: During a safe rest, you can replace one of your known battle spells with another battle spell of the same tier and from the same magic tradition.

tier2.name: Advanced Learning
tier2.description: You learn a battle spell from one of your known magic traditions of a spell tier no higher than your tier. Make this choice again.

tier2.name: Arcane Vitality
tier2.descriptor: You transmute some of your life force into magical essence.
tier2.effect: Spend a recovery, but instead of regaining hit points, you regain mana equal to your tier.

tier2.name: Effortless Spell
tier2.descriptor: With little strain, you cast a familiar spell.
tier2.trigger: You cast a tier 1+ battle spell
tier2.effect: You don't spend mana on the triggering spell.

tier2.name: Magic Surge
tier2.description: When you use high magic, arcane energy leaps out from you at a number of creatures equal to the spell's tier within 1 zone. Target creatures take arcane damage equal to the spell's tier.

tier2.name: Immediate Spell
tier2.descriptor: With great effort, you quickly cast a spell.
tier2.trigger: You cast a battle spell that takes an action
tier2.effect: You can instead use a maneuver to cast the triggering spell

tier3.name: All Knowing
tier3.description: On your turn, you can study as a free action, but only once per turn.

tier3.name: Arcane Ascension
tier3.description: During unleash arcane, you gain a fly speed equal to your land speed and when you start your turn without mana, you regain 2 mana.

tier3.name: Master Arcanist
tier3.description: You gain a second reaction that you can only use on features from this class such as countermagic.

tier3.name: Overpower Magic
tier3.description: All your magical abilities ignore damage resistances.

tier3.name: Unparalleled Magic
tier3.description: You can use high magic a second time per scene.
